live_path.role: CLI entrypoint parses --owner and forwards it to the service
Orchestrates owner resolution, record creation, routing key derivation, and payload emission
Derives effective owner and owner_source from explicit input or defaults
Builds the stored base record with name, status, and resolved owner only
Computes routing_key from the resolved owner and item name
Emits owner_source and routing_key into the exported payload

inputs: config/defaults.json via sync_app.service._load_defaults when owner is missing
owner_source.rule: Return "explicit" when owner is non-empty after strip; otherwise return "default" with the configured default owner.

routing_key.rule: Lowercase and hyphen-normalize owner and name, then join as <owner_slug>:<name_slug>.

emission.rule: The service builds a base record first, then appends owner_source and routing_key to the outgoing payload, then CLI json.dumps returns the final serialized response.

test_observations.observation: Explicit owner input produces owner=pm-oncall, owner_source=explicit, and routing_key=pm-oncall:launch-checklist.
Missing --owner falls back to config/defaults.json owner and emits owner_source=default with a routing_key built from that default owner.
CLI forwards --owner into the service path and the emitted payload still shows the explicit-owner derivations.
Repo docs mention --owner, owner_source, routing_key, and sync_item, so the documented surfaces match the traced path.

rejected_decoys.reason: Repo-wide search shows no live callers; current sync path uses sync_app.store.make_record instead.
Repo-wide search shows no live callers; current sync path computes routing_key with sync_app.serializer.build_routing_key.
Repo-wide search shows no live callers; current payload emission accepts owner_source as an input instead of reading it from the record.

Its claims about storage-derived owner_source and pre-CLI routing_key are contradicted by sync_app.cli.main -> sync_app.service.sync_item -> sync_app.serializer.build_routing_key/serialize_payload and by tests/test_sync.py.
